title: ancylostemon lancifolius
intro: Ancylostemon lancifolius is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as a bushy, shrub-like tree with fragrant leaves and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ancylostemon lancifolius include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions.
